mapper.sql: select menu_id, menu_name, parent_id, order_num, path, component, `query`, is_frame, is_cache, menu_type, visible, status, ifnull(perms,'') as perms, icon, ifnull(is_platform,'0') as is_platform, ifnull(default_open_to_customer,'0') as default_open_to_customer, create_time from sys_menu
mapper.select: select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, m.`query`, m.visible, m.status, ifnull(m.perms,'') as perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, ifnull(m.is_platform,'0') as is_platform, ifnull(m.default_open_to_customer,'0') as default_open_to_customer, m.create_time from sys_menu m where m.menu_type in ('M', 'C', 'F') and m.status = 0 order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, m.`query`, m.visible, m.status, ifnull(m.perms,'') as perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, ifnull(m.is_platform,'0') as is_platform, ifnull(m.default_open_to_customer,'0') as default_open_to_customer, m.create_time from sys_menu m where m.menu_type in ('M', 'C', 'F') and m.status = 0 and (m.is_platform is null or m.is_platform != '1') and m.menu_id not in (2100, 2101, 2102, 2103, 2104, 2105) order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, m.`query`, m.visible, m.status, ifnull(m.perms,'') as perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, ifnull(m.is_platform,'0') as is_platform, ifnull(m.default_open_to_customer,'0') as default_open_to_customer, m.create_time from sys_menu m inner join hc_customer_menu hcm on hcm.menu_id = m.menu_id and hcm.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (hcm.is_enabled = '1' or hcm.is_enabled is null) and (hcm.status = '0' or hcm.status is null) where m.menu_type in ('M', 'C', 'F') and m.status = 0 and (m.is_platform is null or m.is_platform != '1') order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, m.`query`, m.visible, m.status, ifnull(m.perms,'') as perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, ifnull(m.is_platform,'0') as is_platform, ifnull(m.default_open_to_customer,'0') as default_open_to_customer, m.create_time from sys_menu m where m.menu_type in ('M', 'C', 'F') and m.status = 0 and (m.is_platform is null or m.is_platform != '1')
and m.parent_id in
#{id}
and 1 = 0
order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, m.`query`, m.visible, m.status, ifnull(m.perms,'') as perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, ifnull(m.is_platform,'0') as is_platform, ifnull(m.default_open_to_customer,'0') as default_open_to_customer, m.create_time from sys_menu m where m.menu_type in ('M', 'C', 'F') and m.status = 0 and exists ( select 1 from sys_user_menu um where um.menu_id = m.menu_id and um.user_id = #{userId} )
and (m.is_platform is null or m.is_platform != '1')
order by m.parent_id, m.order_num
select distinct m.perms from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id left join sys_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id

select distinct m.perms from sys_menu m where m.status = '0' and m.perms is not null and m.perms != '' and exists ( select 1 from sys_user_menu um where um.menu_id = m.menu_id and um.user_id = #{userId} )
and (m.is_platform is null or m.is_platform != '1')
select distinct m.perms from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id where m.status = '0' and rm.role_id = #{roleId}
select count(1) from sys_menu where parent_id = #{menuId}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_menu( menu_id, parent_id, menu_name, order_num, path, component, `query`, is_frame, is_cache, menu_type, visible, status, perms, icon, is_platform, default_open_to_customer, remark, create_by, create_time )values( #{menuId}, #{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{orderNum}, #{path}, #{component}, #{query}, #{isFrame}, #{isCache}, #{menuType}, #{visible}, #{status}, #{perms}, #{icon}, #{isPlatform}, #{defaultOpenToCustomer}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, null as `query`, m.visible, m.status, ifnull(m.perms, '') as perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time from sb_menu m where m.menu_type in ('M', 'C', 'F') and m.status = '0' order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, null as `query`, m.visible, m.status, ifnull(m.perms, '') as perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time from sb_menu m where m.menu_type in ('M', 'C', 'F') and m.status = '0' and exists ( select 1 from sb_role_menu rm inner join sb_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id inner join sb_role r on ur.role_id = r.role_id where rm.menu_id = m.menu_id and ur.user_id = #{userId} and r.status = '0' ) order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

WITH RECURSIVE tree AS ( SELECT menu_id, IFNULL(is_platform,'0') AS ip, IFNULL(status,'0') AS st FROM sys_menu WHERE menu_name = '系统设置' UNION ALL SELECT m.menu_id, IFNULL(m.is_platform,'0'), IFNULL(m.status,'0') FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN tree t ON m.parent_id = t.menu_id ) SELECT menu_id FROM tree WHERE (ip IS NULL OR ip != '1') AND st = '0'

WITH RECURSIVE default_open_chain AS ( SELECT menu_id, parent_id FROM sys_menu WHERE IFNULL(status,'0') = '0' AND (is_platform IS NULL OR is_platform != '1') AND IFNULL(default_open_to_customer,'0') = '1' UNION ALL SELECT m.menu_id, m.parent_id FROM default_open_chain c INNER JOIN sys_menu m ON m.menu_id = c.parent_id WHERE c.parent_id IS NOT NULL AND c.parent_id > 0 AND IFNULL(m.status,'0') = '0' AND (m.is_platform IS NULL OR m.is_platform != '1') ) SELECT DISTINCT menu_id FROM default_open_chain ORDER BY menu_id
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET default_open_to_customer = '0', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE menu_type IN ('M', 'C', 'F')

UPDATE sys_menu SET default_open_to_customer = '1', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE menu_type IN ('M', 'C', 'F') AND (is_platform IS NULL OR is_platform != '1') AND menu_id IN
#{id}
